name: Mike Pence
subject: This isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great
body:
Critical: Georgia Recount Fund | Thanks to your tremendous
support, the Secretary of State of Georgia announced a full
recount.

Peter,

Thanks to your tremendous
support, the Secretary of State of Georgia announced a full
recount of the Presidential race to ensure that every LEGAL vote
is counted.

This is a major step in the
right direction. I assure you that we will KEEP FIGHTING until
EVERY LEGAL vote for President Trump is counted.

But, this is no small
undertaking, Peter. Recounting EVERY vote by hand will take a
MASSIVE war chest, and we need YOU to help bolster our Official
Georgia Recount Fund.

If you step up NOW you can
increase your impact by 1000%.

I stand with President Trump
in his fight to count every legal vote, do you?

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to the Official Georgia Recount Fund and you can
increase your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

President Trump has never
stopped fighting for us, and now it's time that we fight for him.

It's CRITICAL that you
support the Official Georgia Recount Fund because we cannot allow
the Democrats to try to steal this Election.

Contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to increase your impact by 1000%.

Thank you,

Mike Pence

Vice President of the
United States

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

Neither printed nor produced at government expense.

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great
Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax
purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great
Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America,
and the Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth
Ave New York, NY 10022

We believe this is an important way to reach our
grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team.
It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

# Join US Tonight!
---
Andy Harris is fully supporting Donald Trump for a Second Term, even though President Trump lost the Election and Popular Vote to President-Elect Joe Biden. A lot needs to get done for our Marylander's still, and we need your help to heal our great nation as proclaimed by Joe and Kamala. Trump needs to Concede. It's easy to do because I know I did last week when we lost to Andy. As we look toward 2022, please work with us to ensure our shores stay protected and our healthcare remains affordable. We will continue to strive to restore equity and equality for all in all the upcoming legislative sessions. We're asking you to join our group discussion this upcoming Monday at 7 pm Eastern Time for a Special Election Wrap Up. RSVP: [Click Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=299464.1257.1.92019cf282f1a1c461d880f8666b5860&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDc4NTUxMC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1lYTg5NzM1N2JiNzMyODg5NTdjMmIxMjczNzUzODUyMTA4ZTAwNWVjIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI5OTQ2NCJ9)
---
---
**Warm Regards,** **Friends of Mia Mason**
---
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The election is not over yet! Week of November 16th Action Items
body:
| |
---
Once again, please be sure to open and read through all of our emails because updates and calls to action are coming at us fast and furious, and we may have to send emails more frequently than usual to get that information to you as soon as possible.

And, make sure you are praying for President Trump, his legal team, and our nation.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**CAN YOU VOLUNTEER IN GEORGIA?**
If you can volunteer to help with the recount in Georgia, [please fill out our sign-up form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvNTVadEIyZVFvVlBWcmttdDU_bWlkPTQyOTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=k-WzzFkGmcs9qhgmDK92IQ). Whether you live in Georgia or you can travel to Georgia (as of right now, this would be on your own dime), if you can be on the ground in Georgia, let us know.
[I CAN VOLUNTEER IN GEORGIA](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDJibE5JWHR3NkRDRXZ0WHlBZm1EMHFsWHNrX0hTTXFabnJ3a21vb2o4VnhveUtBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00Mjk4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Tpg-SgnsYwPTefIPghqYgw)
|
---
**RETWEET CALL TO ACTION TO GA SECRETARY OF STATE**
If you are on Twitter, please retweet the tweet below to get the word out about what must happen in Georgia for the recount to count only legal ballots!
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvcmV0d2VldD90d2VldF9pZD0xMzI3MDgyNTk1OTgxNjYwMTYwJm1pZD00Mjk4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=hs60v2baf4qF00xqw5Gr1Q)
[RETWEET](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvcmV0d2VldD90d2VldF9pZD0xMzI3MDgyNTk1OTgxNjYwMTYwJm1pZD00Mjk4NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Gz0mXVuoiwlo1Gsv-yU5xA)
|
---
**MAKE SURE MILITARY BALLOTS ARE COUNTED IN PENNSYLVANIA**
The following request is being put forth by a data team working to help President Trump’s legal team.
_**“Please forward the link pasted below to any member of the military so they can confirm whether or not their vote counted (if they are registered to vote in PA).**_

_**[https://pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/ballottracking.aspx](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXZvdGVyc2VydmljZXMucGEuZ292L3BhZ2VzL2JhbGxvdHRyYWNraW5nLmFzcHg_bWlkPTQyOTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=M_ka0OHn2Ejz9qAekMLDBg)**_

_**If it didn't, have them email voterintegrity@braynard.com and the data team will reach out to have them sign a statement.”**_
|
---
**CHECK THE RALLY/EVENT PAGE OFTEN FOR UPDATES**
Rallies are getting planned and announced so quickly that rather than send an email every time a new one is organized, we are posting them on our [**Protect the Vote 2020** page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=UfsBR73zjbyGPK53WM346w), so please bookmark the page and check it often. You don’t want to miss out on an event in your area/state to show your support for President Trump and America!
[PROTECT THE VOTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTg1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=KZ9n9v1e-FYd8vuVWlQhjQ)
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzIxLWI2MGVmYTA5MzEzYzQ5Yjg4NjRmYTgzZTdiMWMwMDQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDI5ODUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VGf12gx85Yb0f9MZLb53qw)

Friend,

It’s time for us to get MAD.

This Election is unlike any we have ever witnessed. The systemic corruption is breathtaking. The mainstream media, the Left-wing academics, and the entrenched Democrats will all ask us to roll over right now. There is voter fraud in this Election that MUST be reported and uncovered.

President Trump isn’t backing down - nor should he - but he needs YOUR help to keep going. He’s calling on a select group of his STRONGEST supporters, like YOU, to step up and bolster our critical Election Defense Fund.

subject: We failed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

I'll be blunt with you - our chances of keeping Georgia and the Senate red suffered a major blow, but if we can get back on track during this extension, we can still win this race.

| Patriot,
We must fight back against the forces that are trying to steal this election from President Trump. It's no surprise the Democrats have resorted to voter fraud and counting illegal votes to give the victory to Joe Biden.
We must have full transparency in the election process. This is crucial to ensure the integrity of the election and to secure our democratic process from fraud. The people deserve to know that every single LEGAL vote was received and counted before declaring a winner.
As it stands, I am fighting back against the Democrats and their activist judges who made our elections less safe and ripe for fraud. subject: WATCH: Senator David Perdue: Socialists Like AOC, Bernie Sanders Want Total Control Of America
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/588ca8377161/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66123?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **WATCH: Senator David Perdue: Socialists Like AOC, Bernie Sanders Want Total Control Of America**
Yesterday on Fox News' _Sunday Morning Futures_ , Senator David Perdue highlighted how Georgia's two Senate seats are key to saving the Republican majority and stopping the Democrats’ radical agenda, which is spearheaded by socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders.

**PERDUE:**_**"We are the last line of defense against this liberal socialist agenda** __that the Democrats will perpetrate. We heard Schumer say just last week, ‘If we take Georgia, we change America.’ We heard AOC say they have to have these two seats because[they don't want to negotiate.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b9bd178b6d&e=02cd889ad3)"_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7d3ac29fac&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **PERDUE:**_**"They want total control,**__and so what's at stake is this: Schumer will change the rules in the Senate so they can do anything they want."_

**PERDUE:**_"Elizabeth Warren wants to be Secretary of Treasury. It's already a given that Bernie Sanders would be chairman of the Budget Committee, Sherrod Brown would be chairman of the Banking Committee.__**These are people who really do not believe in our free market system**_ _...In the Senate, we can protect the gains and accomplishments of the last four years. President Trump gave us an agenda that created the best economic turnaround in U.S. history. 6.5 million Americans have pulled themselves out of poverty. That will all get undone if we lose both seats in Georgia."_

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7b0dcb9502&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b99f3c98bb&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Last week, the Perdue campaign released a new TV ad and a digital video, both warning of Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Jon Ossoff's plans to radically change America. **

**Watch the TV ad, "Change,"[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4ce0c32c2b&e=02cd889ad3).**

clean_body: | | | | | WATCH: Senator David Perdue: Socialists Like AOC, Bernie Sanders Want Total Control Of America Yesterday on Fox News' Sunday Morning Futures , Senator David Perdue highlighted how Georgia's two Senate seats are key to saving the Republican majority and stopping the Democrats’ radical agenda, which is spearheaded by socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders. PERDUE:"We are the last line of defense against this liberal socialist agenda that the Democrats will perpetrate. We heard Schumer say just last week, ‘If we take Georgia, we change America.’ We heard AOC say they have to have these two seats because" | | PERDUE:"They want total control,and so what's at stake is this: Schumer will change the rules in the Senate so they can do anything they want." PERDUE:"Elizabeth Warren wants to be Secretary of Treasury. It's already a given that Bernie Sanders would be chairman of the Budget Committee, Sherrod Brown would be chairman of the Banking Committee.These are people who really do not believe in our free market system ...In the Senate, we can protect the gains and accomplishments of the last four years. President Trump gave us an agenda that created the best economic turnaround in U.S. history. 6.5 million Americans have pulled themselves out of poverty. That will all get undone if we lose both seats in Georgia." Click or below to watch the segment. | | Last week, the Perdue campaign released a new TV ad and a digital video, both warning of Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Jon Ossoff's plans to radically change America. name: Tim Scott
subject: My Grandfather's 99th Birthday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

My grandfather's 99th birthday would have been this year. I think about his journey every single day.

After reading this story and your prayerful consideration, I hope you will choose to [**stand with me and fight to protect the America we know and love.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my_grandfathers_99th/?utm_campaign=20201116_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040884-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201116_my-grandfathers-99th-birthday)

My grandfather was born in 1921 in small town South Carolina, a little place called Salley.

As a kid, he had to cross the street if a white person was coming.

He suffered the indignity of being forced out of school as a third grader to pick cotton, never learning to read or write.

**And yet he lived long enough to see this country 's arc bend towards justice.**

He lived long enough to see his grandson become the first African American elected to both the United States House and Senate.

He lived long enough to see his wildest dreams become a reality. _From cotton to Congress in one lifetime._

And that's why I believe, with the right decisions, the next American century will be better than the last.

**There are millions of families like mine across this nation -- just like mine -- full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream.**

Friend, I know that times are tough and so many are struggling to provide for their families in this difficult time. So, I am just simply asking for your prayerful consideration.

**If you are inspired to join our movement and stand with me, then please make whatever donation you can afford. No amount is too small.**

**[Stand With Me](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my_grandfathers_99th/?utm_campaign=20201116_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040884-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201116_my-grandfathers-99th-birthday)**
---

Tim Scott
---
PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407
| | Tim Scott for Senate | 1405 Ashley River Road, Charleston, SC 29407

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: He can SAVE THE SENATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend this is Senator Marco Rubio.

I was one of the many Republican Senators who were sanctioned by the Chinese government earlier this year for exposing their cruelties.

**I know just how dangerous the Chinese Communists can be, and we MUST have someone like David Perdue in the Senate to fight back. **

Control for the U.S. Senate is up for grabs in Georgia, and it's critical that David Perdue beats his radical, liberal opponent.

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: "GUNS MAKE IT LESS SAFE:" RAPHAEL WARNOCK WOULD WEAKEN THE SECOND AMENDMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 16, 2020 "GUNS MAKE IT LESS SAFE": RAPHAEL WARNOCK WOULD WEAKEN THE SECOND AMENDMENT ATLANTA - Raphael Warnock is the most radically [anti-gun](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLC9AKwjZtHPF16kcgsZDlR1UWgfnJSvxTewtn3_LN1DkfYaQoMzk6c4GF6eGbbLmVeYP5r8X-gYzgkF4HlHppWIqzP-S5R1Sy4b_CCKgEkrqmCkD-5P-mIVoP4mcUIb8rh81oTzfaY5KdlARnMbKkYI4CM2bLjasTIT2bPnmPp-vVEPnvkHVP7U1BUa0lTzanWtLYKJ9_CYI=&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==) candidate in America who for decades has actively fought to roll back the 2nd Amendment and eliminate Georgians' right to bear arms. As a radical activist preacher, Warnock [lobbied](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLYvRgk8Qz0hVdHyrOggBq1mABIAaBcwzPdXszZMT_hqlOIc-QsGS7mwgyE-TEQHmoR03dJUVfRS_UAcIU-iZVz_3dbEii7VhPeHnIKVOg6y7YM-56j8SqShtA2Hw-SuG2YyZI_04_s1h25G88_zOhhIeLuJObYc5spTKUtPU-wkPGLA9dAS6vgOm9nXcvdUaR&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==) against gun rights both in the Georgia legislature and from his pulpit, where he [asserted](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLY92ZuDv8_BUut0qR2MTiCnRPnbO5Ap0wuOcHD6ZdojWC5DFQPRSECre7gq5pmWMNjyC6V0m3aKkoIElvCYDLFQ==&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==) that "guns make it less safe and not more safe," and condemned pro-gun laws as the "dumbest legislation." He has What do YOU stand for?," [YouTube](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLV38CLPZtbi9ZHHqemMntNpx8fwCgVisdNbW2Taiz8Qtig_K3HJ7e-wWOend1My-x5sU0XAQR8CR8b3ZsHyE5fmUdFiH4pYucD_ld6wkPHGKSV5U-mrepaRTZxbb3i4Ui12s94daddi7g4ybFtcdWcw==&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==), 2/16/2014) - [VIDEO CLIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLwli8cPl1FwWTf-NUzzg_QCIjCvr9FYRkORoB-_7yFN5PcUHE5utvWnRG833EXn1a2BMVsB55I6dUQ5TWdOOesBMVgoy3F4Y83SImgwu0P-JPtDb45tGtOtf284PATmaIUfhochwQd88=&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==)
Warnock Has A History Of Anti-Gun Statements, And Has Worked For Years To Take Away Guns And Restrict Georgians' Right To Defend Themselves. On February 5, 2014, Warnock gave a speech opposing HB 875 to the Georgia General Assembly House Committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security. In his speech, Warnock stated, "We do not want our sanctuaries and the environment of our sanctuaries to be further discombobulated and confused by the presence of guns." Warnock concluded his speech stating, "it's demonstrated in and clear that more guns make it less safe and not more safe." ("pubSafe020514EDITED," Georgia House of Representatives Channel, [YouTube](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLMWpauH2kN_jaJiAVz7JfxyrF0hc-VN83b0LQBXn1iZ1aBmfE008xYYEc2vhA3FxAGq2bzg1TSao3LoTdNRFLOOx_yQNO_v1E9fG77yKrPh8=&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==), 6/26/2019, Min. 1:20:41) - [FULL CLIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLO_cKZQ6nlcjP5VOEKSIEhilR0bU-WsIRDhd00ko7uS3skPgJUs7ZYgExOW8Hj263ZZIdJPPP2m-sZtFt4hz_6w==&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==), [CLIPPED PORTION re: MORE/LESS SAFE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLY92ZuDv8_BUut0qR2MTiCnRPnbO5Ap0wuOcHD6ZdojWC5DFQPRSECre7gq5pmWMNjyC6V0m3aKkoIElvCYDLFQ==&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==)
In January 2014, Warnock Criticized HB 512, a Bill to Allow Guns to Be Carried in Churches, Bars and on College Campuses" as a "Lax" Gun Law In January 2014, Warnock attended a gun buyback event. Atlanta Daily World reported that Warnock viewed the event as "an opportunity to speak out against the possibility of the further easing of gun restrictions in the state." According to the Atlanta Daily World, Warnock singled out HB 512, a bill which "would allow guns to be carried in churches, bars and on college campuses" as a "lax "gun law. ("Church Leaders Speak Out Against Georgia Weapons Laws at Atlanta Gun Buyback," [Atlanta Daily World](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLlk-YNwLJWbQge6isY9lkcQocjPJRO9_HAGQaC-Sz3jajR-UoMra8yK2mPcM4_8oEvis6A-j0lVj-mLH5QvnAUAs-PF13nranqa6gHuDFhWdEQzgQIJpUPE5IgdSSGaidw5GUv1ouOQ2SXiaLjFSd7ZrqcTPkX-Z1Is3WIVJjhbw0Yjg82b2c2WOGTte7ofPKh4hSbHMVK124k9HoVFEbdA==&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==), 1/16/2014)
In April 2014, Warnock Opposed HB 60, a Bill to Allow Guns in Bars without Restriction and in Some Churches, Schools and Government Buildings; HB 60 Was Signed into Law - Warnock Described HB 60 as "this Is the Gun Lobby Foisting Their Agenda on Churches, and I Think It's a Tragic Violation of Church and State" In April 2014, the Georgia legislature passed into law HB 60, a bill that expanded gun rights. According to the Associated Press, HB 60 allowed licensed gun owners to bring guns into "bars without restriction and in some churches, schools and government buildings under certain circumstances." Warnock criticized HB 60 as "This is the gun lobby foisting their agenda on churches, and I think it's a tragic violation of church and state." ("Gun carry rights expanded in Ga. under new law," [Washington Times](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gPj5_9Xjc8wUWCqfBI-1rNaeLIkQt0TVCGJg9dTJmDZqZeTnv3-ZB-tJHUiAZbMLYvRgk8Qz0hVdHyrOggBq1mABIAaBcwzPdXszZMT_hqlOIc-QsGS7mwgyE-TEQHmoR03dJUVfRS_UAcIU-iZVz_3dbEii7VhPeHnIKVOg6y7YM-56j8SqShtA2Hw-SuG2YyZI_04_s1h25G88_zOhhIeLuJObYc5spTKUtPU-wkPGLA9dAS6vgOm9nXcvdUaR&c=hd5xm1UgEmLJHy3o2zrBKPAemzAtxcC2wniVQw3iOGIYMo4qjNAcwQ==&ch=7kbwKMi3cGvGDyqWLdMUz4DsxoUrSZ0u8acsMYtPuSqQ2QI8wAgJnA==), 4/23/2014)
In February 2014, Warnock Opposed HB 875, a Bill to Lift Restrictions on Guns in Bars, Churches, and College Campuses - Warnock Stated, "We Reject the Notion that More Guns Held by More People Will Magically Make Our Communities Safer" In February 2014, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that HB 875 had received its first committee hearing in the Georgia General Assembly. According to the article, HB 875 "would lift restrictions on guns in churches and bars, allow school boards to arm employees and make an end run around a ban on licensed owners carrying guns on college campuses by making it no longer a crime." Warnock opposed HB 875 stating, "We reject the notion that more guns held by more people will magically make our communities safer." ("Religious leaders decry gun proposal," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 2/6/2014)

According to the Atlanta Daily World, Warnock singled out HB 512, a bill which "would allow guns to be carried in churches, bars and on college campuses" as a "lax "gun law. ("Church Leaders Speak Out Against Georgia Weapons Laws at Atlanta Gun Buyback," ==, 1/16/2014) In April 2014, Warnock Opposed HB 60, a Bill to Allow Guns in Bars without Restriction and in Some Churches, Schools and Government Buildings; HB 60 Was Signed into Law - Warnock Described HB 60 as "this Is the Gun Lobby Foisting Their Agenda on Churches, and I Think It's a Tragic Violation of Church and State" In April 2014, the Georgia legislature passed into law HB 60, a bill that expanded gun rights. According to the Associated Press, HB 60 allowed licensed gun owners to bring guns into "bars without restriction and in some churches, schools and government buildings under certain circumstances." Warnock criticized HB 60 as "This is the gun lobby foisting their agenda on churches, and I think it's a tragic violation of church and state." ("Gun carry rights expanded in Ga. under new law," ==, 4/23/2014) In February 2014, Warnock Opposed HB 875, a Bill to Lift Restrictions on Guns in Bars, Churches, and College Campuses - Warnock Stated, "We Reject the Notion that More Guns Held by More People Will Magically Make Our Communities Safer" In February 2014, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that HB 875 had received its first committee hearing in the Georgia General Assembly. According to the article, HB 875 "would lift restrictions on guns in churches and bars, allow school boards to arm employees and make an end run around a ban on licensed owners carrying guns on college campuses by making it no longer a crime." Warnock opposed HB 875 stating, "We reject the notion that more guns held by more people will magically make our communities safer." ("Religious leaders decry gun proposal," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 2/6/2014) | ### Stephen Lawson Communications Director mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com powered by

name: Senate Update (via Team Durbin)
subject: We can still flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Control of the Senate comes down to Georgia -- and Mitch McConnell's allies just announced that they will spend at least **$9 MILLION** to run attack ads against our Democratic candidates, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. **[Will you pitch in $5 now to help them fight back?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201114i_1106&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter, we worked hard to re-elect Senator Durbin and keep Illinois blue -- but President-elect Joe Biden needs a Democratic majority working with him in the Senate.
If we're stuck with McConnell's failed leadership for two more years, we can be sure that the Republican majority will block Democrats' progress for our country at every opportunity.
**[Can you rush in $5 now to help win these seats in Georgia -- and flip the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201114i_1106&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thanks for your support,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201114i_1106&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

After our historic win here in Florida, we owe it to other conservatives across the country to build on this momentum by helping out where we can in other key races.
In our neighboring state of Georgia, two January runoff elections are the last line of defense in holding the majority in the Senate against complete far-left control of Congress!

| Many patriots like you helped Republicans gain seats in the U.S. House of Representatives this year, but Nancy Pelosi still holds a slim majority, which means she will pass the radical agenda of the left. However, we have a chance to stop the radical left's agenda by helping Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue in their January runoffs for Senate!
Kelly and David are our only chance in ensuring Chuck Schumer will NOT have control of the Senate!
America's future is in the balance and it all comes down to Georgia.

clean_body: Georgia needs our help | | | | | | == | Patriot, After our historic win here in Florida, we owe it to other conservatives across the country to build on this momentum by helping out where we can in other key races. In our neighboring state of Georgia, two January runoff elections are the last line of defense in holding the majority in the Senate against complete far-left control of Congress! | | | == | Many patriots like you helped Republicans gain seats in the U.S. House of Representatives this year, but Nancy Pelosi still holds a slim majority, which means she will pass the radical agenda of the left. However, we have a chance to stop the radical left's agenda by helping Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue in their January runoffs for Senate! Kelly and David are our only chance in ensuring Chuck Schumer will NOT have control of the Senate! America's future is in the balance and it all comes down to Georgia. | | | == | If the Left was in control of both chambers in Congress, they would have free reign to pass horrible Socialist tax hikes, defund our law enforcement, and get away with radical policies like the Green New Deal and open borders. We need to protect the balance of power and the future of America! == | | | == | | | == | The battle for America's future will be fought and won in Georgia's January runoffs. We need to hold the line against the far-left so their radical agenda doesn't completely reshape the country we know and love! == | | | == | Thank you for your urgent support! | == | Kat Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

subject: 50 Days To Save The Republican Senate Majority
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6fd8ab7b4673/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66135?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **50 Days To Save The Republican Senate Majority **
Folks -

This morning, **President Donald Trump[ tweeted](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2c46019efd&e=02cd889ad3) his full-fledged support** for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler as they stand in the breach for the Republican majority.

_**Facebook has banned us from advertising, so we're counting on you to share this good news! **_
---
|
---
| **Senator Marsha Blackburn joined Fox Business’ _Mornings with Maria_ to state her support for the Republican Ticket. **

**BLACKBURN:**_“Here is what we know: Chuck Schumer is definitively on the ballot in Georgia - his agenda is 'first we take Georgia, then we change America.'**These two Senate Democratic nominees are the two most radical, leftist Senate nominees I have ever seen. **_

_**"You have in Ossoff a trust-fund socialist who has been on the payroll of a Chinese Communist Party-owned company and failed to report it until he got caught.** You have Warnock, who is a mentee of Jeremiah Wright. And of course we all remember Jeremiah Wright is the one who said he was 'hopeful God would not bless America, that God would damn America.' That is not the people of Georgia." _

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c3dc7db32e&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch Senator Blackburn's interview with Maria Bartiromo. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b34a3d0afb&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Yesterday on Fox News’s _Sunday Morning Futures_ , Senator Perdue called out Democrats for encouraging out-of-state voters to move to Georgia to cast illegal ballots.**

**BARTIROMO:**_"I want to ask you about your opponents and how they are trying to mobilize Georgians to get out and vote Democrat. Andrew Yang, Tom Friedman from the New York Times, all called on friends and supporters to go move to Georgia... Is that even legal to go somewhere just to vote? How does that happen?"_

**PERDUE:**_"It's illegal, and it shows how desperate the Democrats are. They know they can't win straight up - we proved that in our election in my seat.**They know that to win in this runoff they've got to do something illegal, and we're not going to let it happen.** What they're encouraging people to do is to use artificial addresses or move in temporarily. Our law says they have to be here permanently. It just shows they're willing to do anything - lie, steal, cheat - to win this election."_

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=771a554215&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=556dc7015e&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Joins Sunday Morning Futures on Fox News")
---
| **Over the weekend, Senator Perdue spoke with Governor Mike Huckabee about what could happen if Chuck Schumer becomes the majority leader.**

**HUCKABEE:**_"If you don't win this race, Chuck Schumer could end up being the majority leader. What does that mean to people who don't live in Georgia?"_

**PERDUE:**_"What Schumer has said is**he will do away with the filibuster rule, and that will allow him to do anything he wants** with 51 votes... He can stack the court, he can add four new seats with two new states, and he can fool around with the electoral college. So what that means to everybody around the country is that he can execute this liberal agenda that we heard perpetrated during the presidential election." _

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=84fb24982c&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c98ac87aca&e=02cd889ad3 "Sen. David Perdue Joins The Huckabee Show")
---
| _**Latest from the Campaign Trail **_
---
| **[Fox News:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a8d5024696&e=02cd889ad3) Rubio campaigns in Georgia for Loeffler, Perdue as race for Senate control comes into focus**

_Rubio, R-Fla., at the event with Loeffler and Perdue's wife, Bonnie, warned of socialism and rioting and threats to free speech, citing his origins in South Florida where many Cubans who escaped from communist Cuba live. _

_**"What stands in the way of all of that becoming public policy in America, even half of it becoming public policy in America?" Rubio asked the crowd. "You through your vote in this race."**_

**[Forsyth County News:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0261520e5a&e=02cd889ad3) Rick Scott joins Loeffler, Perdue for campaign event**

_There was a lot of political firepower in Forsyth County on Friday afternoon, as three Republican members of the U.S. Senate were in attendance to help keep the Senate in Republican control..._

_**“So how do we win these elections? It’s voting,” Scott said. “So, the moment you can vote, go vote.** The moment you get your friend to go vote, make sure they go vote. We need to do everything we can to make sure we get our hook in as early as possible. We’ve got to do this all across the state.

“The Democrats believe this is their chance. If they can win the Senate, then all the bad stuff can pass.”_
---
|
---
| **[Newt Gingrich 360:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d820c23160&e=02cd889ad3) Why Republicans Must Win the Georgia Senate Runoffs**

**_"I know of no other occasion in which the levers of power over the entire country have so hung in the balance than in these races..._**

_"Ossoff has accepted money from Al Jazeera and Richard Li, an extremely wealthy Chinese media mogul who has condemned the pro-Democracy movement in Hong Kong and sided with the Communist dictatorship in China...

"Clearly, liberal donors across the country expect Ossoff to be a loyal vote no matter what radical or liberal bill Schumer brings up._

**[Daily Caller:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=106491ce16&e=02cd889ad3) Sen. David Perdue: Winning Georgia Senate Seats Is ‘The Last Line Of Defense Against This Liberal Socialist Agenda’**

_“We heard [Senate Minority Leader Chuck] Schumer say just last week if we take Georgia we change America...We heard [Democratic New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] say they have to have these two seats because they don’t want to negotiate.**They want total control.”**_
---
| **Last week, the Perdue campaign released a new TV ad and a digital video, both warning of Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Jon Ossoff's plans to radically change America. **

**Watch the TV ad, "Change,"[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e727f5ca83&e=02cd889ad3).**
**_Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=85af12aacf&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=314ee5c5fe&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._**

**Watch the video, "Save Georgia, Save America,"[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=747fb533b4&e=02cd889ad3).** _**Click[HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8da794478a&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2baa4adcad&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet.**_ ###
---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Ability to Control Territory, Co-opt Governments Makes Mexican Cartels Greatest Threat to U.S.
body:
While mainstream media coverage of a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) threat assessment focuses on white supremacists, the lengthy report offers plenty of other serious national security threats that have selectively been ignored.

[ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21166&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RcWk1Q3Y0T0ZKZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTYxOTU1MDE=)
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 16, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21223&F=H&) | **[Public Colleges Defy Federal Law with Racially Segregated Events to Further Diversity](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21223&F=H&)** The Department of Justice (DOJ) should investigate “an alarming trend of racial segregation” at America’s taxpayer-funded universities, according to a pair of United States Senators who cite a number of troubling examples in a letter to Attorney General William Barr. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21223&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21239&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3RhdGVtZW50LXByZXNpZGVudGlhbC1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTE2MTk1NTAx) | **[Judicial Watch Statement on the Disputed Presidential Election](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21239&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3RhdGVtZW50LXByZXNpZGVudGlhbC1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTE2MTk1NTAx)** Changing results after Election Day raises significant legal and constitutional concerns, and President Trump should use available legal and constitutional remedies to help ensure the election results can be trusted by the American people. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21239&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3RhdGVtZW50LXByZXNpZGVudGlhbC1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTE2MTk1NTAx)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21229&F=H&) | **[Ability to Control Territory, Co-opt Governments Makes Mexican Cartels Greatest Threat to U.S.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21229&F=H&)** While mainstream media coverage of a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) threat assessment focuses on white supremacists, the lengthy report offers plenty of other serious national security threats that have selectively been ignored. Among them are Mexican-based drug cartels that control territory along the U.S. Southwest border. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21229&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21188&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbWNjYWJlLXRleHQtbWVzc2FnZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==) | **[Federal Court Hearing Today in Judicial Watch Lawsuit for Andrew McCabe Emails and Text Messages](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21188&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbWNjYWJlLXRleHQtbWVzc2FnZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==)** In 2017, Judicial Watch uncovered Justice Department records concerning ethics issues related to McCabe’s involvement with his wife’s political campaign. The documents include an email showing Mrs. McCabe was recruited for a Virginia state senate race in February 2015 by then-Virginia Lieutenant Governor Ralph Northam’s office. The news that former Secretary of State Clinton used a private email server broke five days later, on March 2, 2015. Five days after that, former Clinton Foundation board member and Democrat party fundraiser, Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe, met with the McCabes. She announced her candidacy on March 12. Soon afterward, Clinton/McAuliffe-aligned political groups donated nearly $700,000 (40% of the campaign’s total funds) to McCabe’s wife for her campaign. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21188&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbWNjYWJlLXRleHQtbWVzc2FnZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [Trump’s Election Legal Fight Preceded by Battles Over Dirty Voter Rolls ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21250&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZWxlY3Rpb24tZGlydHktdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==) The Washington Times “It’s a major issue that the rolls are dirty, because dirty rolls lead to dirty elections,” said Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch president. “The rolls are filthy.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21250&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZWxlY3Rpb24tZGlydHktdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==)
---
### [The Daily Caller News Foundation Forces Government To Release Emails Showing WHO-Connected Accountability Group Pushed To Praise China’s COVID-19 Response ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21138&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZGFpbHktY2FsbGVyLWZvcmNlcy1lbWFpbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==) The Daily Caller “These Fauci emails show how praising China was the odd priority for of WHO in the face of a novel and dangerous coronavirus” added Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That the NIH tried to slow-rolled the release of these records emails and is still sitting on thousands more is a scandal.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52050&L=21138&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZGFpbHktY2FsbGVyLWZvcmNlcy1lbWFpbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTExNjE5NTUwMQ==)

clean_body: While mainstream media coverage of a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) threat assessment focuses on white supremacists, the lengthy report offers plenty of other serious national security threats that have selectively been ignored. = | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 16, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The Department of Justice (DOJ) should investigate “an alarming trend of racial segregation” at America’s taxpayer-funded universities, according to a pair of United States Senators who cite a number of troubling examples in a letter to Attorney General William Barr. == ---|--- | | | | | Changing results after Election Day raises significant legal and constitutional concerns, and President Trump should use available legal and constitutional remedies to help ensure the election results can be trusted by the American people. ---|--- | | | | = | = While mainstream media coverage of a Department of Homeland Security (DHS) threat assessment focuses on white supremacists, the lengthy report offers plenty of other serious national security threats that have selectively been ignored. Among them are Mexican-based drug cartels that control territory along the U.S. Southwest border. = ---|--- | | | | == | == In 2017, Judicial Watch uncovered Justice Department records concerning ethics issues related to McCabe’s involvement with his wife’s political campaign. The documents include an email showing Mrs. McCabe was recruited for a Virginia state senate race in February 2015 by then-Virginia Lieutenant Governor Ralph Northam’s office. The news that former Secretary of State Clinton used a private email server broke five days later, on March 2, 2015. Five days after that, former Clinton Foundation board member and Democrat party fundraiser, Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe, met with the McCabes. She announced her candidacy on March 12. Soon afterward, Clinton/McAuliffe-aligned political groups donated nearly $700,000 (40% of the campaign’s total funds) to McCabe’s wife for her campaign. == ---|--- | | | == The Washington Times “It’s a major issue that the rolls are dirty, because dirty rolls lead to dirty elections,” said Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch president. “The rolls are filthy.” == == The Daily Caller “These Fauci emails show how praising China was the odd priority for of WHO in the face of a novel and dangerous coronavirus” added Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That the NIH tried to slow-rolled the release of these records emails and is still sitting on thousands more is a scandal.” == == Bloomberg News Republican state attorneys general, industry groups and conservative activists will sue if they don’t like Biden’s initiatives, as they did during the Obama administration and as Democrats have under President Donald Trump. And the new judges hearing those cases could put up some formidable obstacles to the Democratic agenda. == == == = = == == | CLIPS = == TWEETS | | | | | = ---|---|--- DEVELOPING: Increasing pressure on PA, WI, MI, AZ, NV, GA State Legislatures and Congress to rejected any tainted election results. To do that, we need to raise $25,000 into our recount fund. I cannot overstate the importance of this recount. Right now, this margin in this race is just 47 votes, making it too close to call, and I'm asking for your help to make sure every vote is counted and the results reflect the hard work we put into this campaign. **[Can I count on you to chip in $20 today so we can see this race through to the end?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlHMwvWnGs7D8vYpNreK8fvzUjy-F-fpoxiCmlf0uW4=/9JuTyeprKw8iSzV4p6Q8-2PNmxNVopWI3R7q1neVe_4=?refcode=201116-email&amount=20)** Thank you so much for all your help and hard work over the past year. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New virtual workshops for caregivers
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week, I talked about some of the challenges that COVID-19 has created for our most vulnerable populations and the people who take care of them. These caretakers are simultaneously losing some of the support systems they relied on while dealing with the additional burden of keeping themselves and the people in their care safe from this virus.
Ensuring that the caregivers in our state have the support and resources they need to make it through the pandemic is paramount. That's why the Department of Health and the Rhode Island Parent Information Network are starting a series of new, free virtual workshops to support Rhode Islanders who serve as caregivers for older adults and people with chronic conditions.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PGcRNgFD_vZizsfLVQNsD6L-p7ZOWG1eR9iAmEOJsyu7rAriqnKX8VZC8qKvgdTvTSQe6vlMxzaCX4fASe5XqP-e65jsks8CpcFvScb59A_wlS3nUJY6lIPm02qRe646LE1jSszzSwPOVGP8NGUiS-G0RaWoVmQ-3WGKI8Crw1uLrd8TERNTqtNcD4KLjRFhMN4CUrbAGr8=&c=gYlhwwLtJM4-M8xOXFiPdV6nTqDSuM_BHdQ2rxdetVzEGBYsS_fxUQ==&ch=6O8E2kLizZm1_LtPfBUb4Qf_W4tje8cRhe3_Kxjj0RCzMCLdpK6bMQ==)
---
| These workshops, called Powerful Tools for Caregivers, feature six weeks of group sessions aimed at giving caretakers the tools they need to succeed in these challenging times in areas like stress management and communication. These courses are offered through weekly 90-minute virtual sessions and will help caretakers and their loved ones thrive during this difficult time.
These free workshops are starting throughout the next week on November 17, November 21, November 24, and November 25. If you or someone you know is serving as a caregiver for an older adult and person with chronic conditions, encourage them to learn more or sign up by calling the Community Health Network at 401-432-7217 or visiting [www.ripin.org/chn](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PGcRNgFD_vZizsfLVQNsD6L-p7ZOWG1eR9iAmEOJsyu7rAriqnKX8S25DkQpONTqPdOYXb7HWd2Rah8Exzy7ydARmB-BLfly5Z14Sqvpw8_wjVExqYtM0DjetFi2G67x670-pTkUrxEZXOugtAgGOQ==&c=gYlhwwLtJM4-M8xOXFiPdV6nTqDSuM_BHdQ2rxdetVzEGBYsS_fxUQ==&ch=6O8E2kLizZm1_LtPfBUb4Qf_W4tje8cRhe3_Kxjj0RCzMCLdpK6bMQ==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PGcRNgFD_vZizsfLVQNsD6L-p7ZOWG1eR9iAmEOJsyu7rAriqnKX8fHtr9pvRBCLo0A4JRg7HkyLFSmyLq-RWDGESQlaB7s4-x99D8HvcGXD6PkrET6KDji7-Z6NyVSi2uQvdvkYjplKLy1QgKyryC3S_lqLRimv7yT2wcAmcaOxraIuJydvtAu3B-1yrSdkWmQXMQs5A59GNEm9c18ZEzzip9-uxL8UKGPo9qsjC3GP7UZ0OD3C7DV-CEPezjpvRra3Lgv1l5ThJZpPPDo9nC9KBKmSjfcgqt7N1sNJS0q167I7EsMadpzh5EvrfhcAF9yZBkaEKPo=&c=gYlhwwLtJM4-M8xOXFiPdV6nTqDSuM_BHdQ2rxdetVzEGBYsS_fxUQ==&ch=6O8E2kLizZm1_LtPfBUb4Qf_W4tje8cRhe3_Kxjj0RCzMCLdpK6bMQ==).
---

clean_body: Victory in Georgia is within our reach. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because you signed up to receive emails that help elect Republicans. To update your email preferences, . Peter -- we have bad news, and we have good news. **Bad News: We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal last night, and if we don’t make up the ground today we could be forced to scale back our plans. Good News: We’ve gotten clearance to extend our mid-month deadline by one day (today), so there’s still time to meet our goal with your help. Republicans are making great progress towards winning the Senate Runoff Elections in Georgia. But we simply can’t afford to be out-raised or out-spent. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

name: NDTC
subject: A Special Post-Election Q&A with Founder and CEO Kelly Dietrich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
Ask him all of your burning questions!
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter – This week marks NDTC’s first ever Great Democratic Debrief, our latest initiative to problem solve, strategize, and prioritize training and resources for future election cycles.

That’s why we are SO excited to invite you to a very special Post-Election Q&A with NDTC’s Founder and CEO Kelly Dietrich to talk about the importance of campaign debriefs and answer any questions you might have about hosting your own!

[Here are the details](https://t.dripemail2.):
Post-Election Q&A:
How to Have an Effective Political Campaign Debrief
Thursday, Nov 19
1:00pm - 2:00pm ET
---
| [RSVP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
Debriefing a campaign is SUPER important. Examining this campaign can help you or the next Democrat running for the seat be more effective and efficient.

And since campaigning 2020 was full of challenges, it’s critically important to figure out what did and didn’t work while it’s all fresh on your mind.

So, join Kelly and the NDTC team this Thursday at 1:00pm ET to ask any question you might have to make sure your debriefs are as successful and valuable as possible.
| [RSVP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
— The NDTC Team
